languages.original_text: {n}Pain lances through your entire being. You want to scream in the hope that it will alleviate this unbearable suffering... but then you realise that the agony, at once fleeting and unending, has already stopped. Your vision doubles and splotches of colour seem to swim in the air in front of you.{/n} "I have made a small addition to your physiology — I am eager to observe how you make use of your new trophy. And observe I shall, all the while voicing my opinions directly to your ears — wherever you may be."

languages.text: {n}Острая боль пронзает все ваше существо. Вы хотите кричать в надежде, что это облегчит невыносимое страдание... и тут понимаете, что мука, одновременно мимолетная и бесконечная, уже прервалась. Перед глазами двоится и плывут цветные пятна.{/n} "Я внес небольшое дополнение в твою физиологию — мне интересно проследить, как ты распорядишься своим трофеем. Проследить и высказать свое мнение, которое ты услышишь — где бы ни находил{mf|ся|ась}".

Проследить и высказать свое мнение, которое ты услышишь — где бы ни находил{mf|ся|ась}".

languages.text: {n}全身を貫くような痛み。この耐え難い苦しみを和らげるために叫びたい衝動に駆られるが、その瞬間に、一瞬にして過ぎ去りながら終わることのない苦しみは既に止まっていることに気づく。視界が二重になり、目の前の空間に色斑が浮かび上がる。{/n}「あなたの生理学に小さな変化を加えた。この新しい獲得物をどのように活用するのか、観察するのが楽しみだ。そして、あなたがどこにいようと、私の意見を直接あなたの耳に伝えながら、観察を続けよう」
languages.original_text: {n}Pain lances through your entire being. You want to scream in the hope that it will alleviate this unbearable suffering... but then you realise that the agony, at once fleeting and unending, has already stopped. Your vision doubles and splotches of colour seem to swim in the air in front of you.{/n} "I have made a small addition to your physiology — I am eager to observe how you make use of your new trophy. And observe I shall, all the while voicing my opinions directly to your ears — wherever you may be."

traits.locale_text:
全身を貫くような痛み。この耐え難い苦しみを和らげるために叫びたい衝動に駆られるが、その瞬間に、一瞬にして過ぎ去りながら終わることのない苦しみは既に止まっていることに気づく。視界が二重になり、目の前の空間に色斑が浮かび上がる。
「あなたの生理学に小さな変化を加えました。この新しい獲得物をどのように活用するのか、観察するのが楽しみです。そして、あなたがどこにいようと、私の意見を直接あなたの耳に伝えながら、観察を続けましょう。」

languages.text: {n}剧痛瞬间贯穿全身。你想尖叫，期盼能借此缓解这难以忍受的折磨……但紧接着你便意识到，那既短暂又永恒的痛苦已经停止了。你眼前的世界开始重叠，斑驳的色块在空气中游离。{/n}“我对你的生理结构做了一点小补充——我很想看看你会怎么使用这新得的纪念品。而且我会一直看着，随时把想法直接送进你耳朵里——无论你身在何处。”
languages.original_text: {n}Pain lances through your entire being. You want to scream in the hope that it will alleviate this unbearable suffering... but then you realise that the agony, at once fleeting and unending, has already stopped. Your vision doubles and splotches of colour seem to swim in the air in front of you.{/n} "I have made a small addition to your physiology — I am eager to observe how you make use of your new trophy. And observe I shall, all the while voicing my opinions directly to your ears — wherever you may be."

traits.locale_text: {n}剧痛瞬间贯穿全身。你想尖叫，期盼能借此缓解这难以忍受的折磨……但紧接着你便意识到，那既短暂又永恒的痛苦已经停止了。你眼前的世界开始重叠，斑驳的色块在空气中游离。{/n}“我对你的生理结构做了一点小补充——我很想看看你会怎么使用这新得的纪念品。而且我会一直看着，随时把想法直接送进你耳朵里——无论你身在何处。”

languages.text: {n}El dolor atraviesa la totalidad de tu ser. Quieres gritar, con la esperanza de que hacerlo alivie este sufrimiento insoportable... pero entonces comprendes que la agonía, efímera e interminable al mismo tiempo, ya se ha detenido. Tu visión se duplica y parecen flotar manchas de colores en el aire frente a ti.{/n} «He realizado una pequeña adición a tu fisiología; ardo en deseos de ver cómo utilizarás tu nuevo trofeo. Y observaré, no lo dudes, mientras transmito mis opiniones directamente en tus oídos... estés donde estés».
languages.original_text: {n}Pain lances through your entire being. You want to scream in the hope that it will alleviate this unbearable suffering... but then you realise that the agony, at once fleeting and unending, has already stopped. Your vision doubles and splotches of colour seem to swim in the air in front of you.{/n} "I have made a small addition to your physiology — I am eager to observe how you make use of your new trophy. And observe I shall, all the while voicing my opinions directly to your ears — wherever you may be."

traits.locale_text: {n}El dolor atraviesa la totalidad de tu ser. Quieres gritar, con la esperanza de que hacerlo alivie este sufrimiento insoportable... pero entonces comprendes que la agonía, efímera e interminable al mismo tiempo, ya se ha detenido. Tu visión se duplica y parecen flotar manchas de colores en el aire frente a ti.{/n} «He realizado una pequeña adición a tu fisiología; ardo en deseos de ver cómo utilizarás tu nuevo trofeo. Y observaré, no lo dudes, mientras transmito mis opiniones directamente en tus oídos... estés donde estés».

languages.text: {n}Ein heftiger Schmerz durchfährt dein ganzes Wesen. Du willst schreien, um dieses unerträgliche Leid zu mildern ... aber dann erkennst du, dass der gleichzeitig flüchtige wie unaufhörliche Schmerz bereits verfolgen ist. Deine Sicht verschwimmt und vor deinen Augen tanzen bunte Farbkleckse.{/n} "Ich habe eine kleine Änderung an deiner Physiologie vorgenommen ... und bin sehr gespannt, was du mit deiner neuen Trophäe anstellen wirst. Ich werde dich beobachten, während ich meine Meinung direkt in deine Ohren flüstere ... egal, wo du bist."
languages.original_text: {n}Pain lances through your entire being. You want to scream in the hope that it will alleviate this unbearable suffering... but then you realise that the agony, at once fleeting and unending, has already stopped. Your vision doubles and splotches of colour seem to swim in the air in front of you.{/n} "I have made a small addition to your physiology — I am eager to observe how you make use of your new trophy. And observe I shall, all the while voicing my opinions directly to your ears — wherever you may be."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein heftiger Schmerz durchfährt dein ganzes Wesen. Du willst schreien, um dieses unerträgliche Leid zu mildern ... aber dann erkennst du, dass der gleichzeitig flüchtige wie unaufhörliche Schmerz bereits verfolgen ist. Deine Sicht verschwimmt und vor deinen Augen tanzen bunte Farbkleckse.{/n} "Ich habe eine kleine Änderung an deiner Physiologie vorgenommen ... und bin sehr gespannt, was du mit deiner neuen Trophäe anstellen wirst. Ich werde dich beobachten, während ich meine Meinung direkt in deine Ohren flüstere ... egal, wo du bist."

languages.text: {n}Une vive douleur transperce tout votre corps. Alors que vous êtes sur le point de hurler dans l'espoir de soulager ces élancements intolérables, vous vous rendez compte que la souffrance, à la fois éphémère et éternelle, a déjà cessé. Vous voyez double et des taches de couleur semblent danser dans l'air devant vous.{/n} « J'ai ajouté un petit quelque chose à votre physiologie. J'ai hâte de voir comment vous vous servirez de votre nouveau trophée. Et je ne manquerai pas de vous observer, tout en vous donnant mon opinion directement dans vos oreilles, où que vous soyez. »

And observe I shall, all the while voicing my opinions directly to your ears — wherever you may be."

J'ai hâte de voir comment vous vous servirez de votre nouveau trophée. Et je ne manquerai pas de vous observer, tout en vous donnant mon opinion directement dans vos oreilles, où que vous soyez. »

languages.text: {n}Acı, tüm varlığını delip geçiyor. Bu dayanılmaz ıstırabı hafifleteceği umuduyla çığlık atmak istiyorsun... Ancak sonra hem geçici hem de bitmek bilmeyen bu acının çoktan durduğunu fark ediyorsun. Görme yetin çiftleşiyor, önünüzdeki havada renk lekeleri yüzüyormuş gibi görünüyor.{/n} "Fizyolojine küçük bir ekleme yaptım. Yeni ganimetini nasıl kullandığını gözlemlemek için sabırsızlanıyorum. Nerede olursan ol... Seni gözlemleyecek ve görüşlerimi doğrudan kulaklarına fısıldayacağım."
